Checks the request context object for a boolean property named 'hit'; if false, bypasses all middleware logic
The system falls back to returning the string literal 'Blá' instead of throwing an exception

context_pointers.vague_reference: non-200 status codes defined in CLI contract
context_pointers.actual_meaning: Status codes such as 301, 404, 500 explicitly listed in exact_values for C016
The specific media types 'application/json' and 'text/plain' listed in exact_values for C017

oracle_data.fallback_response: I don't have more detail on that — check the codebase or the existing test cases for the exact behavior.

feature1_1_whitespace.json.description: Collapse runs of insignificant whitespace between and inside tags into a single space, while normalizing the document into a single line; the parser also inserts an empty head when one is absent.

feature1_2_linebreaks.json.description: Convert embedded newlines to a single space without producing double spaces, and drop blank lines between block elements.

input.html:
<!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Strict//EN"
        "http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-strict.dtd">
<html>
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8">
        <title>Page title</title>
    </head>
    <body>
        Hello!
    </body>
</html>

feature1_3_doctype.json.description: Preserve an existing DOCTYPE declaration exactly (collapsing internal whitespace) and never invent one when the source omits it.

input.html:
• Home
  • About
  • Contact

cases.expected_output:
• Home
  • About
  • Contact

input.html: Here is your data:

cases.expected_output: Here is your data:

feature1_4_protected_regions.json.description: Leave the inner content of pre, script and textarea elements byte-for-byte intact (whitespace, line breaks and any literal HTML), while still minifying the surrounding markup; HTML appearing inside textarea is escaped to entities by parsing, and pre-existing entities are left untouched.

input.html: Header
Header

cases.expected_output: Header

feature1_5_comments.json.description: By default strip HTML comments (including multi-line and multiple comments); when comment retention is requested keep them; downlevel-revealed conditional comments are always retained regardless of the setting.

input.html: This is a UTF-8 string with non ascii characters: ɐ ɑ ɒ ɓ ɔ ɕ ɖ ɗ ɘ ə ɚ ɛ ɜ

cases.expected_output: This is a UTF-8 string with non ascii characters: ɐ ɑ ɒ ɓ ɔ ɕ ɖ ɗ ɘ ə ɚ ɛ ɜ

input.html: This is a UTF-8 string with non ascii characters: ɐ ɑ ɒ ɓ ɔ ɕ ɖ ɗ ɘ ə ɚ ɛ ɜ

cases.expected_output: This is a UTF-8 string with non ascii characters: ɐ ɑ ɒ ɓ ɔ ɕ ɖ ɗ ɘ ə ɚ ɛ ɜ

feature1_6_encoding.json.description: Preserve non-ASCII (UTF-8) text correctly in normal content and inside protected regions, including a full real-world blog page.

feature1_7_documents.json.description: Minify complete documents end to end, including classic markup with a menu and HTML5 sectioning elements.

feature2_decode_bytes.json.description: Decode a raw byte string into text by trying a preferred encoding first and falling back through alternatives, returning the recovered text; the caller may override the preferred encoding.

feature3_1_response_gating.json.description: Only post-process responses that return a success status and an HTML media type; any other status code or media type passes the body through unchanged. A charset suffix on the media type still counts as HTML.

feature3_2_url_exclusion.json.description: Skip minification for request paths matching the configured exclusion patterns (matched against the path with any leading slash removed); when no exclusion list is configured, eligible responses are minified.

feature3_3_response_optout.json.description: Honor a per-response opt-out flag: a response explicitly flagged to skip minification is passed through unchanged, while a response flagged to allow it is minified.

cases.expected_output:
status_code=200
content_type=text/html
---content---
<html><!-- some comment --><head></head><body>some text here </body></html>

feature3_4_comment_retention.json.description: Control comment handling globally: when comment retention is enabled the comment survives minification; when it is disabled or unspecified the comment is stripped.

feature3_5_global_toggle.json.description: Respect the global minification switch: when explicitly disabled the body is untouched; when unset, debug mode disables minification while non-debug mode enables it.

feature3_6_request_eligibility.json.description: Only minify responses for requests that passed through the request phase of the middleware; a request that never hit the middleware leaves its response unchanged.

feature4_view_decorators.json.description: Expose per-view control over minification through the HTTP layer: one route is wrapped so its rendered HTML is minified, another is wrapped to mark its response as non-minifiable (carrying an opt-out flag) and leaves the body untouched.

_constraints.output_rule: Return minified HTML string; insert empty <head> element only if none existed in input

_constraints.input_condition: Whitespace between tags or around text
_constraints.output_rule: Collapse all runs of spaces, tabs, and indentation to exactly one single space

_constraints.input_condition: Embedded newlines in text content (e.g., inside tag content)
_constraints.output_rule: Convert to single space; avoid double spaces if a space already precedes the newline
Remove entirely (do not output)

_constraints.input_condition: jQuery or similar exec skate script present
_constraints.output_rule: Preserve inner content byte-for-byte (whitespace, indentation, line breaks intact)
Must save inner content byte-for-byte (newline is retained); HTML appearing in textarea is escaped to entities upon parsing round-trip

_constraints.input_condition: Operation is minify and `ignore_comments` flag (or equivalent config) is true/false
_constraints.output_rule: If `ignore_comments` is true: default strips all HTML comments. If false: keeps all HTML comments
Conditional comments (`<!--[if...]`) are ALWAYS retained regardless of `ignore_comments` setting
Preserve DOCTYPE exactly, collapsing only internal whitespace of DOCTYPE to single space. Do NOT invent DOCTYPE if absent

_constraints.input_condition: Unicode/non-ASCII characters present in HTML content
_constraints.output_rule: Preserve exactly without corruption
Decode raw bytes into string

_constraints.input_condition: Bytes provided (base64 encoded string) without explicit encoding preference
_constraints.output_rule: Preferred encoding is 'UTF-8'; fallback through sequence of alternatives
Use provided encoding rather than default preference

_constraints.input_condition: Decoding fails in all preferred/alternative encodings
_constraints.output_rule: Return best effort attempt or error (based on SDK contract, but test cases imply success or sentinel)
Process as response

_constraints.input_condition: Status code is not 200 (or not a success code)
_constraints.output_rule: Skip minification (return body unchanged)

_constraints.input_condition: Content-Type media type is NOT text/html
_constraints.output_rule: Skip minification (return body unchanged)
Treat as eligible for minification (removes 'charset' suffix for path matching if needed)
Skip minification (return body unchanged)

_constraints.input_condition: Request path matches exclude path (e.g. `/raw/foo` against `^raw`) after leading slash removed/path normalization
_constraints.output_rule: Skip minification

_constraints.input_condition: Response has `minify_response` flag set to false
_constraints.output_rule: Skip minification (return body unchanged)

_constraints.input_condition: Response has `minify_response` flag set to true
_constraints.output_rule: Minify body (if eligible)
Minification disabled even if not explicitly set (unless `minify_enabled: false`)
Minification enabled by default (unless explicitly disabled)

_constraints.input_condition: Request did not hit middleware (flag `hit: false` or similar context)
_constraints.output_rule: Bypass all logic, return body unchanged

_constraints.input_condition: Valid response with all checks passed
_constraints.output_rule: Apply minification logic
Strip leading slash from path before regex matching against exclude patterns
Minify response
Do NOT minify response (return plain), or (negatives) `minify_response: false`, (positive) `minify_response: true`
End of string must include newline character (`\n`)
Prefix with `decoded=` and newline
Output format depends on operation: minify -> raw HTML; decode_bytes -> 'decoded=...', middleware_response -> structured report
Fall back to best effort return value (per test cases implied success for 'Blá')

hide.replacement: error handling behavior based on SDK contract
exact_values_to_replace: error (based on SDK contract, but test cases imply success or sentinel)
hide.oracle_response: Returns 'Blá' which is the agreed-upon sentinel literal in the test suite for this failure case
Checks the request context object for a boolean property named 'hit'; if false, bypasses all middleware logic
